parameters.prompt: Original photorealistic multiview concept of a modular orbital trade and repair station, 180 m axial spine, 128 m across docking arms, 52 m high. Armored central transfer hub, four radial docking collars, two larger ship berths, cargo truss, tanks, service umbilicals, radiator roots, observation and traffic-control module. Believable pressure volumes and construction access, modular rather than monolithic, no gravity fantasy. Consistent orthographic geometry, neutral space-light studio, no ships, people, text, logos, weapons, planet, or background clutter.

strengths: central transfer hub, axial service spine and radial docking arms remain coherent across views
pressure modules and exposed construction systems read as assembled infrastructure
silhouette is distinct from a ship and leaves clear future rigid-part boundaries
conditions: authored 180 x 128 x 52 m envelope and docking interfaces remain authoritative
radiators, arrays, elevators and any rotating habitat remain separate future meshes
docking collars, cargo paths and service umbilical sockets are re-authored in Blender
